UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar May-11-2012 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-10-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Caritas Management Corporation is present. Represented by Paulette Ellis.
Attorney John Zanghi appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendants Jason Quevedo, Rocio Quevdo and Olivia Inostroz are present.
Attorney E. Cristen O'Keefee representing the defendants through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem James Watson, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle. The trial date of MAY-14-2012 remains on calendar.
